subject: feat(pwa): add dedicated 180px apple-touch-icon
body:
Apple recommends exactly 180x180 for the home-screen icon. Previously
<link rel="apple-touch-icon"> pointed at icon-192.png, forcing iOS to
downscale and losing crispness on Retina displays. Adds a dedicated
180x180 PNG rendered from the SVG source at density 400, copies it to
public/assets/images/ so Expo serves it at /assets/images/..., and
updates +html.tsx to reference the new file at the correct size.

Tags: pwa, ios, icons
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-polish
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MmYgkDuYLSCs1giR4bz6kF
title: add dedicated 180px apple-touch-icon
